basic.style:
<style version="1.4" name="basic" 
         synopsis="basic shapes, ramps, baners, sprites, lights, and sound">
	<placeholder texture="loadtile.gif"/>
	<sky texture="clouds.gif"/>
	<ground texture="terrain.gif"/>
	<orb texture="sun.gif"/>

	<block symbol="#" double=".#"  file="full.block"/>
	<block symbol="h" double=".h"  file="half.block"/>
	<block symbol="\" double=".\"  file="cornerwall.block"/>
	<block symbol="-" double=".-"  file="ceiling.block"/>
	<block symbol="_" double="._"  file="floor.block"/>
	<block symbol="," double=".,"  file="ground.block"/>
	<block symbol="/" double="./"  file="halfceiling.block"/>
	<block symbol="%" double=".%"  file="halffloor.block"/>
	<block symbol="I" double=".I"  file="column.block"/>
	<block symbol="Y" double=".Y"  file="platform.block"/>
	<block symbol="p" double=".p"  file="halfpyramid.block"/>
	<block symbol="P" double=".P"  file="pyramid.block"/>
	<block symbol=":" double=".:"  file="curvein.block"/>
	<block symbol=";" double=".;"  file="curveout.block"/>
	
	<block symbol="N" double=".N"  file="nramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="S" double=".S"  file="sramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="E" double=".E"  file="eramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="W" double=".W"  file="wramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="k" double=".k"  file="nbottomramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="m" double=".m"  file="sbottomramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="l" double=".l"  file="ebottomramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="j" double=".j"  file="wbottomramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="K" double=".K"  file="ntopramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="M" double=".M"  file="stopramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="L" double=".L"  file="etopramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="J" double=".J"  file="wtopramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="`" double=".`"  file="cornerramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="}" double=".}"  file="bottomcornerramp.block"/>
	<block symbol="{" double=".{"  file="topcornerramp.block"/>
	
	<block symbol="B" double=".B"  file="bannervert.block"/>
	<block symbol="b" double=".b"  file="bannerhoriz.block"/>
	<block symbol="$" double=".$"  file="bannersquare.block"/>
	<block symbol="V" double=".V"  file="pedestal.block"/>
	<block symbol="@" double=".@"  file="portal.block"/>
	
	<block symbol="|" double=".|"  file="nstube.block"/>
	<block symbol="=" double=".="  file="ewtube.block"/>
	<block symbol="[" double=".["  file="necornertube.block"/>
	<block symbol="(" double=".("  file="secornertube.block"/>
	<block symbol=")" double=".)"  file="swcornertube.block"/>
	<block symbol="]" double=".]"  file="nwcornertube.block"/>
	<block symbol="T" double=".T"  file="nttube.block"/>
	<block symbol="t" double=".t"  file="sttube.block"/>
	<block symbol="F" double=".F"  file="ettube.block"/>
	<block symbol="f" double=".f"  file="wttube.block"/>
	<block symbol="+" double=".+"  file="xtube.block"/>
	
	<block symbol="~" double=".~"  file="sound.block"/>
	<block symbol="'" double=".'"  file="pointlight.block"/>
	<block symbol="!" double=".!"  file="spotlight.block"/>
	<block symbol="^" double=".^"  file="pulselight.block"/>
	<block symbol="?" double=".?"  file="searchlight.block"/>
	<block symbol="*" double=".*"  file="revolvelight.block"/>
	
	<block symbol="1" double=".1"  file="sprite.block"/>
	<block symbol="2" double=".2"  file="spriterevolve.block"/>
	<block symbol="3" double=".3"  file="spriteface.block"/>
	<block symbol="4" double=".4"  file="spritefacet.block"/>
</style>

blocks/revolvelight.block:
<!-- (C) Copyright 1999 Flatland Online Inc. -->
<!-- All rights reserved. Patent pending. -->
<BLOCK NAME="revolvelight" ENTRANCE="yes">
	<VERTICES>
	</VERTICES>
	<PARTS>
	</PARTS>
	<BSP_TREE ROOT="0"/>
	<SPOT_LIGHT STYLE="revolve" BRIGHTNESS="100%" RADIUS="4.0" SPEED=".25" DIRECTION="(0,0)..(180,0)" CONE="90"/>
</BLOCK>

blocks/topcornerramp.block:
<!-- (C) Copyright 1999 Flatland Online Inc. -->
<!-- All rights reserved. Patent pending. -->
<BLOCK NAME="topcornerramp" TYPE="structural">
	<VERTICES>
		<VERTEX REF="1" COORDS="( 256.00000, 128.00000,   0.00000)"/>
		<VERTEX REF="2" COORDS="(   0.00000, 128.00000,   0.00000)"/>
		<VERTEX REF="3" COORDS="(   0.00000, 256.00000, 256.00000)"/>
		<VERTEX REF="4" COORDS="( 256.00000, 128.00000, 256.00000)"/>
		<VERTEX REF="5" COORDS="( 256.00000,   0.00000, 256.00000)"/>
		<VERTEX REF="6" COORDS="(   0.00000,   0.00000, 256.00000)"/>
		<VERTEX REF="7" COORDS="(   0.00000,   0.00000,   0.00000)"/>
		<VERTEX REF="8" COORDS="( 256.00000,   0.00000,   0.00000)"/>
	</VERTICES>
	<PARTS>
		<PART NAME="sup" TEXTURE="cement.gif">
			<POLYGON REF="1" VERTICES="1,2,3" TEXCOORDS="(1,1),(0,1),(0,0)" FRONT="0" REAR="7"/>
		</PART>
		<PART NAME="eup" TEXTURE="cement.gif">
			<POLYGON REF="2" VERTICES="4,1,3" TEXCOORDS="(1,1),(0,1),(1,0)" FRONT="0" REAR="6"/>
		</PART>
		<PART NAME="bottom" TEXTURE="cement.gif">
			<POLYGON REF="3" VERTICES="5,6,7,8" TEXCOORDS="(0,0),(1,0),(1,1),(0,1)" FRONT="0" REAR="5"/>
		</PART>
		<PART NAME="n" TEXTURE="cement.gif">
			<POLYGON REF="4" VERTICES="4,3,6,5" TEXCOORDS="(0,0),(1,0),(1,1),(0,1)" FRONT="0" REAR="0"/>
		</PART>
		<PART NAME="edown" TEXTURE="cement.gif">
			<POLYGON REF="5" VERTICES="5,8,1,4" TEXCOORDS="(1,1),(0,1),(0,0),(1,0)" FRONT="0" REAR="4"/>
		</PART>
		<PART NAME="sdown" TEXTURE="cement.gif">
			<POLYGON REF="6" VERTICES="8,7,2,1" TEXCOORDS="(1,1),(0,1),(0,0),(1,0)" FRONT="0" REAR="3"/>
		</PART>
		<PART NAME="w" TEXTURE="cement.gif">
			<POLYGON REF="7" VERTICES="3,2,7,6" TEXCOORDS="(0,0),(1,0),(1,1),(0,1)" FRONT="0" REAR="2"/>
		</PART>
	</PARTS>
	<BSP_TREE ROOT="1"/>
</BLOCK>
